team.b: Third generation. Joined 2009. Leads investment advisory.
16 years. Settled ₹120 Cr in claims since 2015.
Joined from Standard Chartered Private in 2021.

convictions.d: We sell no product. We are paid on disclosed commissions and retainers, with full audit trails.
Every relationship begins with a written plan. Reviewed quarterly. Updated annually.
Term + health cover precedes any equity allocation. Without exception.
Index, large-cap and balanced funds form 70% of most portfolios. Always have.
Tax-efficiency is an architectural decision, not an annual scramble.
We plan across yours, your children's, and their children's horizons.
